TON MIXING SERVICE

ANONYMOUS & SECURE HIGH VOLUME TON MIXER

  • Enter your NEW TON addresses here.
    Only TON addresses are supported.
    Please check the correctness of entered address! The arrival time of your clean coins depends on the delay you chose at the beginning of the session.

  • Input amount of TON you would like to mix.
    Don't forget that service takes random comisson 1% - 5%
    We advice to set a custom fee to prevent amount-based blockchain analysis.

  • The mixing fee ranges from 1% to 5%
    (the higher percentage - better anonymity).
  • The transfer delay determines how long it will take for your payments to the specified addresses to begin. In general, the longer the transfer delay, the more anonymous your coins become. With large volumes of transactions, a transfer delay of several hours is recommended.

    • Warning!

    Transaction size shouln't be less than 20 TON


    FAQ | CONTACT
